view.title: Validate persona scenario #4

blocks.title: Persona Scenario Validate 4 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires a deterministic validation of the scenario where a persona onboards new staff with a corporate template. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms the scenario behavior is supported or that it produces a clear, actionable failure report. The linked use cases and prior steps do not provide concrete evidence related to the onboarding process, leading to an inconclusive status.
